response.step_by_step_log: Identified songs via on-screen text ('プラネタリウム', 'RELAY'). Used simplified search strings: '"プラネタリウム" 大塚愛 Japanese and English lyrics' and '"RELAY" Konami Amusement Japanese and English lyrics'. Found the lyrics content for both songs. Confirmed performers as Hololive VTubers.
response.global_summary: A concert video segment featuring VTubers Shirogane Noel, Shiranui Flare, Houshou Marine, and Usada Pekora. The segment includes a performance of Ai Otsuka's 'Planetarium' by Noel and Flare, followed by an interlude, and a performance of the song 'RELAY' by Noel, Marine, and Pekora.

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel and Shiranui Flare perform 'Planetarium' on a virtual stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
プラネタリウム
行きたいよ
君のそばに
ちいさくても
ちいさくても
1番に
君がスキだよ
つよく
いられる
願いを
流れ星に
そっと
と唱えてみたけれど
泣きたいよ
届くだろう
きれいな空に
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I'm just looking at the planetarium,
Thinking of you,
Even though I know you won't change at all,
My sad feelings are swelling up,
No matter how much I think about you, you're not here anymore.
I want to go, to your side,
Even if it's small, I'll hold your small hand tightly,
I want to cry, to the beautiful sky,
I want to go, to your side,
I love you, I can stay strong.
Wishing on a shooting star,
I tried whispering quietly,
I want to cry, it should reach you,
To the beautiful sky.

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine, and Usada Pekora perform 'RELAY', the opening theme for 'Powerful Pro Baseball 2024-2025'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine, Usada Pekora
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もう何十回
もう何百回も
霞むソラ見上げて
辿り着いた場所が
運命のダイヤモンド
何千回
もう何万回も
涙流したきみへ
ねぇ
諦められたことはあったっけ？
「憧れ＝限界」だから
もういらないよ
そこに留まるなんてもったいないでしょ？
それぞれの物語
交差する瞬間を
見つめる意味は
放った夢だけ
大きな弧を描いて
はちきれそうな
煌めきを
消えることなく
どこまでもでも
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
How many tens of times, how many hundreds of times
I look up at the hazy sky
The place I reached is
The diamond of destiny
How many thousands of times, how many tens of thousands of times
To you who shed tears
Hey, have you ever given up?
"Longing = Limit", that's why
I don't need it anymore
It's a waste to just stay there, right?
Crossing moments of our respective stories
The meaning of staring is
The dream I released alone
Drawing a big arc
The sparkling that's about to burst
Without disappearing
Wherever it may be
